html:
The Splumonkey Pod is an object found in Ruins, most commonly in the Village Biome. It appears as a large wooden monkey head idol with Cave Banana "hair" and a gaping mouth. Splumonkeys spawn from the Splumonkey Pod, with a maximum of four Splumonkeys out at a time. Splumonkey Pods will spawn a Splumonkey every 30 seconds and if one or more have been killed, will regenerate Splumonkeys every 120 seconds.

When an Earthquake occurs, or a Splumonkey has been killed by the player, Splumonkey Pods will stop spawning Splumonkeys, and all previously spawned Splumonkeys will return to their pod.

The Pod is flammable, and burning it will force out its Splumonkey inhabitants, causing them to take fire damage.

The pod can be hammered down with a Hammer with 4 strikes, which will drop 2 Manure, 2 Cave Bananas, and very rarely, a Gnome. Destroying a pod will not cause Splumonkeys to attack the player who hammered it. The pod is respawned after the Ancient Fuelweaver is killed.

Trivia

  • The Splumonkey Pod was originally called a "barrel" and looked closer to a generic barrel, but this was changed in A Moderately Friendly Update. The barrel was likely a reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".

Gallery

  • The Barrel, old texture for the Splumonkey Pod.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"monkeybarrel"
“Did that just move?”
–Wilson
“What a wonderfully flammable home.”
–Willow
“This... thing. It smells not so good.”
–Wolfgang
“It's filthy.”
–Wendy
“WHAT A PITIFUL HOME.”
–WX-78
“This appears to be the home of several primates.”
–Wickerbottom
“What a fine choice of building materials.”
–Woodie
“What a disgusting home.”
–Maxwell
“Holds a concentrated compound of fun.”
–Wagstaff
“What hörrörs dwell within?”
–Wigfrid
“Did you hear something?”
–Webber
“Neat abode, guys.”
–Walani
“An absolute madhouse.”
–Warly
“They be keepin' treasures in thar, no doubt.”
–Woodlegs
“HOUSE O' LITTLE UNPIGS”
–Wilba
“Full of Cheekies”
–Wormwood
“It's trying to look scary, but it doesn't quite pull it off.”
–Wheeler
“Ha! Smells like me after a full shift!”
–Winona
“Home of the little sirs.”
–Wortox
“Look like a friendly face, florp.”
–Wurt
“I'm sure it's just an ordinary barrel.”
–Walter
“At least they make it easy to remember who lives here.”
–Wanda
The Splumonkey Pod is an object found in Ruins, most commonly in the Village Biome. It appears as a large wooden monkey head idol with Cave Banana "hair" and a gaping mouth. Splumonkeys spawn from the Splumonkey Pod, with a maximum of four Splumonkeys out at a time. Splumonkey Pods will spawn a Splumonkey every 30 seconds and if one or more have been killed, will regenerate Splumonkeys every 120 seconds.
When an Earthquake occurs, or a Splumonkey has been killed by the player, Splumonkey Pods will stop spawning Splumonkeys, and all previously spawned Splumonkeys will return to their pod.
The Pod is flammable, and burning it will force out its Splumonkey inhabitants, causing them to take fire damage.
The pod can be hammered down with a Hammer with 4 strikes, which will drop 2 Manure, 2 Cave Bananas, and very rarely, a Gnome. Destroying a pod will not cause Splumonkeys to attack the player who hammered it. The pod is respawned after the Ancient Fuelweaver is killed.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Splumonkey Pod was originally called a "barrel" and looked closer to a generic barrel, but this was changed in A Moderately Friendly Update. The barrel was likely a reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".

The Barrel, old texture for the Splumonkey Pod.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vỏ Khỉ Hang là một vật thể được tìm thấy trong Tàn tích, phổ biến nhất là trong Quần xã Làng. Nó xuất hiện như một thần tượng đầu khỉ bằng gỗ lớn với "tóc" Cave Banana và cái miệng há hốc. Khỉ Hang sinh sản từ Vỏ Khỉ Hang, với tối đa bốn Khỉ Hang xuất hiện cùng một lúc. Vỏ Khỉ Hang sẽ sinh ra một Khỉ Hang sau mỗi 30 giây và nếu một hoặc nhiều con bị giết, sẽ tái sinh Khỉ Hang sau mỗi 120 giây.

The '''Splumonkey Pod''' is an object found in [[Ruins]], most commonly in the [[Village]] [[Biome]]. It appears as a large wooden monkey head idol with [[Cave Banana]] "hair" and a gaping mouth. [[Splumonkey]]s spawn from the Splumonkey Pod, with a maximum of four Splumonkeys out at a time. Splumonkey Pods will spawn a Splumonkey every 30 seconds and if one or more have been killed, will regenerate Splumonkeys every 120 seconds.

When an [[Earthquake]] occurs, or a Splumonkey has been killed by the player, Splumonkey Pods will stop spawning Splumonkeys, and all previously spawned Splumonkeys will return to their pod.

The Pod is [[Fire|flammable]], and burning it will force out its Splumonkey inhabitants, causing them to take fire damage.

The pod can be hammered down with a [[Hammer]] with 4 strikes, which will drop 2 [[Manure]], 2 Cave Bananas, and very rarely, a [[Gnome]]. Destroying a pod will not cause Splumonkeys to attack the player who hammered it. The pod is respawned after the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]] is killed.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
*The Splumonkey Pod was originally called a "barrel" and looked closer to a generic barrel, but this was changed in ''[[Version History#A Moderately Friendly Update|A Moderately Friendly Update]].'' The barrel was likely a reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".
